title: diplopappus scaber
intro: Diplopappus scaber is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the rough-leaved diplopappus or rough diplopappus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to provide various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Diplopappus scaber can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion for its medicinal benefits, although its use and preparation should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
